core_mechanism: weak (wave) turbulence energy cascade driven by resonant four-wave nonlinear interactions, transferring a conserved quantity from the injection scale toward both smaller and larger scales with amplitude-dependent scaling
brief_reason: The abstract describes energy cascading away from the initial spectral peak toward longer and shorter wavelengths with cascades that scale with amplitude as predicted by four-wave scattering models of turbulence, i.e. a resonant four-wave weak-turbulence cascade.
